paper_release_boundary: The archived official commit is dated 2026-03-10, after immutable arXiv v1 (2025-08-12). It is current-release evidence, not the exact manuscript-time implementation. The repository names no paper commit and contains no tracked paper outputs or bundled OfficeBench testbeds; README instructions fetch those separately.

inspection.scope: Complete tracked tree enumerated; task/subtask and dialogue records programmatically audited; representative Plus and Neo task/history records traced; runner, environment, memory, configuration, evaluator, generation, and cleaning code inspected.
important_release_findings: All 602 task records and dialogue records are present, but source testbeds must be imported from a mutable OfficeBench checkout.
Four Neo tasks invoke evaluator function names absent from the release evaluator imports and therefore fail closed via exception rather than evaluating the declared criterion.
No tracked trajectories/results reproduce manuscript tables.
The release preserves post-run testbeds and histories, but broad shell execution and copied private configuration are not evidence of a network-denied or secret-safe sandbox.
